name: triage-recovery
description: Per-issue dispatch: strip orphan workflow labels from ONE OPEN GitHub Issue that both pipelines skip — triager skips anything carrying ≥1 workflow label (labelMapping keys ∪ prioritizer.labels); orchestrator skips anything without an actionable-phase label. The intersection is orphaned. Labels are removed via the poll:state boundary hook (gh issue edit --remove-label) using the AI structured output's issue.labels.remove field. Use the .agent/triage-recovery/script/dispatch.sh ad-hoc dispatcher to fan out orphan issues; this binary handles ONE issue per invocation.

issue.description: GitHub Issue number to recover in this invocation (per-issue dispatch).

repository.description: Optional owner/repo override for gh state checks. Default: current repo (gh context).

workflow.description: Path to the downstream workflow JSON used to derive the workflow label set (labelMapping keys ∪ prioritizer.labels) and the actionable-label set (labelMapping entries whose phase has type=='actionable'). Recovery removes only orphan workflow labels (workflow ∖ actionable).
